name: Violet

sheet.name: Violet
sheet.background_story:
Once gifted a brush from Detriti, Violet has set out on a path of creation and destruction. She seeks knowledge and power most of all. 

After Detriti's passing she felt compelled to leave the swamp and her knight armor behind. On lighter feet she traverses the lands in search of higher wisdom and to aid in Detriti's retribution. 

Violet enjoys art, botany, magic and the chaos of nature.
